name: Innorel Pallor

sheet.name: Innorel Pallor
sheet.background_story: Born to a humble family in a small village, Innorel was beset with poor health through all of her childhood. Afflicted with a number of illnesses that could see her death, Innorel's parents kept an emotional distance. Compounded with a lack of social interaction with others as she was bedridden through her formative years, Innorel has developed into a competent, but socially inept adult.
